summary: Iteration 5 - Complete E2E Testing. Backend 17/17 tests passed. Frontend all pages working. All 4 service flows tested successfully. Chat fully functional. WorldOffice structure verified. Calendar showing scheduled services.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <tbody>' - React DevTools overlay issue, does not affect functionality
WebSocket connection warning on initial load - reconnects automatically, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 service flows working correctly: LOCAL, POR FUERA, Multiple Items, Technician Change
WorldOffice structure (primer_nombre, segundo_nombre, primer_apellido, segundo_apellido) working correctly
Chat component fully functional - messages sent and received, user list working
Calendar showing 21 scheduled services with week view
Inventory page working but empty (0 items) - expected as no items created
Service Types page showing 9 active service types
Dashboard KPIs: 32 services, 5 reports, 6 technicians, 3.9h average time
seed_data_creation: Created 4 test services with WorldOffice structure: TEST_Juan Carlos Pérez Gómez (LOCAL), TEST_María González López (POR FUERA), TEST_Pedro Antonio Ramírez Castro (Multiple Items), TEST_Ana Martínez (Technician Change). Created 2 technical reports with materials and digital signatures. Sent chat message for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend 17/17 tests pass. Frontend all pages functional. Chat component is now working (was placeholder in iteration 4, now fully functional). Calendar shows scheduled services. Inventory page empty but functional. Service creation with WorldOffice structure working. Reports with materials and digital signatures working.

backend: POST /api/auth/login - Login with httpOnly cookies working
GET /api/services - Returns 32 services with WorldOffice structure
POST /api/services - Creates service with WorldOffice structure
POST /api/reportes - Creates report with materials and signature
frontend: Dashboard - KPI stats: 32 services, 5 reports, 6 technicians, 3.9h avg time
Services - 32 orders with WorldOffice names, multiple services per order visible
Services - Search by client name working
Users - 12 users displayed with roles (Admin, Supervisor, Tecnico, Asesor)
Reportes - 5 reports listed with estado filter
CrearReporte - Modal with search and filter working
Chat - FULLY FUNCTIONAL: User list, message sending, message history, read receipts
Calendar - 21 scheduled services displayed in week view
Inventory - Page working (0 items - empty but functional)
Service Types - 9 service types displayed with edit/delete options

flujo_3_multiples_items.details: Created service for TEST_Pedro Antonio Ramírez Castro with 3 services (1 principal + 2 adicionales)

flujo_4_cambio_tecnico.details: Created service for TEST_Ana Martínez, changed technician, modification recorded in history

calendario_agendados.details: 21 services with scheduled dates visible in week view calendar

bugs_fixed_from_iteration_4.status: FIXED - Chat component now fully functional

rca_of_issues: No critical issues found. All requested features working correctly.
